introSection: Hydrus is a steel roller coaster located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA. It opened on May 6, 2017 as part of a boardwalk expansion that also saw the addition of Ferris Wheel. This was the first new coaster to open on the pier since the Star Jet was destroyed by Hurricane Sandy in October 2012.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Hydrus is a new model of Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter named the Model 320. This is the Model 320+ without the end helix.

fullText:
Hydrus is a steel roller coaster located at Casino Pier in Seaside Heights, New Jersey, USA. It opened on May 6, 2017 as part of a boardwalk expansion that also saw the addition of Ferris Wheel. This was the first new coaster to open on the pier since the Star Jet was destroyed by Hurricane Sandy in October 2012.

Hydrus is a new model of Gerstlauer Euro-Fighter named the Model 320. This is the Model 320+ without the end helix.
